lifting_anchor.description: A component that adds lifting anchors to walls according to predefined rules

mesh_bars.description: A component that creates main reinforcement for concrete slabs or walls

TopAsBott.description: top bars use bottom bar properties: 0 = yes, 1 = no

SpacTypBotSec.description: Spacing mode for bottom secondary rebars: 0 = by spacing, 1 = by number of bars, 2 = by exact spacings

SpacTypBotPri.description: Spacing mode for bottom primary rebars: 0 = by spacing, 1 = by number of bars, 2 = by exact spacings

SpacTypTopSec.description: Spacing mode for top secondary rebars: 0 = by spacing, 1 = by number of bars, 2 = by exact spacings

SpacTypTopPri.description: Spacing mode for top primary rebars: 0 = by spacing, 1 = by number of bars, 2 = by exact spacings

BarTypeBott.description: bottom bars creation type: 1 = bar group, 0 = mesh

BarTypeTop.description: top bars creation type: 1 = bar group, 0 = mesh

BottomDistance.description: concrete cover thickness for the bottom layer

TopDistance.description: concrete cover thickness for the top layer

BottRebars.description: bottom bars placement: 1 = secondary above primary, 0 = primary above secondary

TopRebars.description: top bars placement: 1 = secondary above primary, 0 = primary above secondary

MinRebarLength.description: minimum length of primary bar to be created

MinRebarLengthSec.description: minimum length of secondary bar to be created

CoverDoor.description: concrete cover thickness between the bar to the edge of the door opening

DoorSize.description: ignore door openings smaller than this value

CoverHole.description: concrete cover thickness between the bar to the edge of the window opening

OpenSize.description: ignore window openings smaller than this value

BottSecClass.description: Tekla class of the bottom secondary bars

TopSecClass.description: Tekla class of the top secondary bars

BottPriClass.description: Tekla class of the bottom primary bars

TopPriClass.description: Tekla class of the top primary bars

BottSecName.description: name of the bottom secondary bars

TopSecName.description: name of the bottom secondary bars

BottPriName.description: name of the bottom primary bars

TopPriName.description: name of the top primary bars

BottSecStart.description: start number for the bottom secondary bars

TopSecStart.description: start number for the top secondary bars

BottPriStart.description: start number for the bottom primary bars

TopPriStart.description: start number for the top primary bars

BottSecPrefix.description: prefix for the bottom secondary bars

TopSecPrefix.description: prefix for the top secondary bar

BottPriPrefix.description: prefix for the bottom primary bar

TopPriPrefix.description: prefix for the top primary bar
